Please find attached our recent review of Nanning WH positioning to both
THCB and VNCB.

The findings have been aligned with VN, TH and CN teams.

Let me know for any questions.

*Regional CB*

My apologies, please find updated deck to this topic.

content.question:
Thanks.



@Anh Tran <anh.tran@shopee.com> @Handhika Wiguna Jahja <jahjah@sea.com> Fyi.



Slide 6

   - CPO of Anbo is so much higher than NNWH?

- For TH, why is Anbo only 0.4 days faster than SLS while for VN, it is
   3.5 days?
- #2 – For TH, all CB orders can be fulfilled locally?

That is quite
   different from previous understanding?

Slide 9

   - For both VN and TH
      - What is before/after?
- How does it compare with SLS?
- How does it compare with Anbo WH?

Others

   - What is the utilization rate for NNWH and Anbo right now?

How will the
   changes affect these WH?
- When will we announce the changes?
And when will it take effect?

- For VN/TH, we should announce it concurrently with 3PF/Local WH
   benefits to soften the blow?

content.answer:
NNWH has a cheaper rental and costs 0.4x of Anbo for each square meter
because 1) Anbo is closer to big cities and with higher demand; 2)
Warehouse market in Nanning is over supplied last year, so the price is good

NNWH has a lower salary rate and costs 0.81x of Anbo, but with similar
productivity

NNWH has slightly lower consumable cost: NNWH re-use some consumable
from Lang Hua WH, eg: the carton box at 7 RMB each



   -

   For TH, why is Anbo only 0.4 days faster than SLS while for VN, it is
   3.5 days?

Sorry there was a BI data issue for SLS to VN BWT data. Please find below
the updated table

For VN, SLS BWT is 4.6 days. NNWH is around 1 day faster vs SLS while Anbo
is 0.7 day faster vs SLS, both are quite similar to each other.


   -

   #2 – For TH, all CB orders can be fulfilled locally? That is quite
   different from previous understanding?

There will still be CB orders that cannot be fulfilled locally with FBS,
e.g., prohibited/ license categories for WH, Made to order/ customizable
SKUs etc. We will push these SKUs using 3PFs.

The update from previous understanding is

   -

   Recently there’s spike in GR risk as the minister of industry is
   specifically targeting Chinese owned inventory after the collapse building
   case from May earthquake
   -

   Given this, TH’s decision based on Legal/ Risk/ Government Relation team
   advice is to adopt stricter requirements for CB FBS vs 3PF since stocks is
   stored in Shopee’s WH
   -

   In the long run, the plan is to have government API sync with TH Shopee
   and license constraints expected to be at listing level, impacting all
   fulfillment channels. However, the API sync timeline still uncertain and
   pending government confirmation

Slide 9

   -

   For both VN and TH
   -

      What is before/after? For commissions and SLS discount?
      -

      How does it compare with SLS? Sellers?
      -

      How does it compare with Anbo WH?

Please find below table for assumption details, in short,

   -

   NNWH Commission: same as Anbo sellers, lower than SLS sellers
   -

   NN SLS discount: remove existing discount by 24/46% margin for VN/TH
   respectively, post adjustment margin same as normal SLS sellers

Yes, confirmed this with NN and Anbo PICs. CPO difference between Anbo and
NNWH is mainly due to

1) NNWH has a cheaper rental and costs 0.4x of Anbo for each square meter
because 1) Anbo is closer to big cities and with higher demand; 2)

Hi Ian,

@Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com> @Ning Li <ning.li@shopee.com> when
does the lease for NNWH end? I wonder what is the long term view of this WH
given

   - Utilization should go down quite a bit with this change
   - We have space in Anbo WH
   - BWT difference between NN and Anbo is not huge (even though it is
   indeed cheaper)

NNWH leasing contract will end by 24th Nov, 2027, >2 years from now;
However, NNWH cost to terminate the contract earlier isn't very high and
much lower than AnboWH:

   - the penalty cost for NNWH early termination is 3 months of rental
   (~200K USD) vs.
   - that of Anbo WH is to fully pay 3 years' rental (~11mil USD)


*Best regards,*

*LI Ning*
SCS
Do we need still the 2% discount?

content.question:
Can help to calculate whether it make sense to continue it, or whether we
should just close it, consolidate everything in Anbo and take the loss.
